Remove A11y statement from unrelated location (#1433)

The accessibility statement is becoming its own page in
https://github.com/elastic/kibana/pull/220997

This can only be merged once the redirect update request to the new page
is properly implemented (ETA June 10th)

Prepare stackpack download pages for 8.18.2 release. (#1506)

Adds 8.18.2 to the download pages. (Release date May 29)

Release issue: https://github.com/elastic/cloud/issues/141348

Co-authored-by: Nick Benoit <nick.benoit@elastic.co>
fixing code sample substition (#1551)

Add known issue for osquery integration failure on macOS [#1528] (#1533)

This PR adds a known issue affecting Elastic Agent 9.0.0 and 9.0.1 on
macOS, where the osquery integration fails due to the removal of the
`osquery.app/` directory during installation. A workaround is provided.

See [#8245](https://github.com/elastic/elastic-agent/issues/8245) for
more context.

chore: Update docs/docset.yml edot-android 1.2.1 (#262)

Merge remote-tracking branch 'upstream/main' into known-issue-osquery-macos & resolve conflicts

Clarifications on 'no downtime' during upgrades (#1421)

Current wording suggests that no downtime is expected during upgrades
whatever the deployment topology is.
Non-HA deployments (on single AZ) are subject to downtime as the
Elasticsearch node upgrade happens inline with a rolling change.

Also for Kibana upgrade, all Kibana instances are shutdown
simultaneously which makes Kibana inaccessible during the Kibana upgrade
plan whatever the zone distribution is.

Preview here:
- [Availability during
upgrades](https://docs-v3-preview.elastic.dev/elastic/docs-content/pull/1421/deploy-manage/upgrade/deployment-or-cluster/upgrade-on-ech)

---------

Co-authored-by: Edu González de la Herrán <25320357+eedugon@users.noreply.github.com>

This PR adds a known issue affecting Elastic Agent 9.0.0 and 9.0.1 on macOS, where the osquery integration fails due to the removal of the `osquery.app/` directory during installation. A workaround is provided. 

See [#8245](https://github.com/elastic/elastic-agent/issues/8245) for more context.

This PR adds a new troubleshooting section for the EDOT Collector, explaining how to use the `pprof` extension to diagnose `OOMKilled` (out-of-memory) errors.

**Note:**  
This is a **draft PR** and **should not be merged** until [elastic/docs-builder#847](https://github.com/elastic/docs-builder/issues/847) is merged, as the current redirect behavior may cause broken links.

Fix formatting error in the 9.0.2 release notes (#1509)

This PR fixes a formatting error in the 9.0.2 fleet & agent release
notes. No content changes beyond the correction were made.
